Note 1 - Debt Service Calculation Method
tool_args.raw_text: (1) Forecasted debt service is calculated based upon projected monthly deposits from available pledged revenues into debt service accounts. Actual payments to bondholders are made from the debt service accounts when due as required for each series of bonds and do not conform to this schedule.

payload.claim_text: Forecasted debt service is calculated based upon projected monthly deposits from available pledged revenues into debt service accounts. Actual payments to bondholders are made from the debt service accounts when due as required for each series of bonds and do not conform to this schedule.
payload.subject: Debt Service

tool_args.label: Note 3 - Debt Service Allocation
tool_args.raw_text: (3) Debt service is allocated among Transit, Commuter, MTA Bus, and TBTA categories based on actual spending of bond proceeds for approved capital projects. Allocation of 2 Broadway COPs is based on occupancy.

payload.claim_text: Debt service is allocated among Transit, Commuter, MTA Bus, and TBTA categories based on actual spending of bond proceeds for approved capital projects. Allocation of 2 Broadway COPs is based on occupancy.
payload.subject: Debt Service Allocation

tool_args.label: Dedicated Tax Fund Variance Explanation Oct 2022
tool_args.raw_text: Timing related to the early receipt of BAB subsidy.

payload.claim_text: Timing related to the early receipt of BAB subsidy.

tool_args.label: MTA Transportation Revenue Variance Explanation Oct 2022
tool_args.raw_text: Cash call of outstanding bonds and timing as debt service was prefunded to November 15th. Variance was partially offset by the early receipt of BAB subsidy. The prefunding timing variance will reverse in Nov. 2022.

payload.claim_text: Cash call of outstanding bonds and timing as debt service was prefunded to November 15th. Variance was partially offset by the early receipt of BAB subsidy. The prefunding timing variance will reverse in Nov. 2022.

tool_args.label: TBTA General Resolution Variance Explanation Oct 2022
tool_args.raw_text: Timing of debt service deposits as debt service was prefunded to November 15th. Variance will reverse in November 2022.

payload.claim_text: Timing of debt service deposits as debt service was prefunded to November 15th. Variance will reverse in November 2022.

tool_args.label: TBTA Subordinate Variance Explanation Oct 2022
tool_args.raw_text: Timing of debt service deposits as debt service was prefunded to November 15th. Variance will reverse in November 2022.

payload.claim_text: Timing of debt service deposits as debt service was prefunded to November 15th. Variance will reverse in November 2022.
